name: EnWave Corporation
description: EnWave Corporation is a Canada-based advanced technology company that has developed Radiant Energy Vacuum (REV™) technology, a proprietary method for the precise dehydration of organic materials. The company licenses its REV™ technology to food, cannabis, and pharmaceutical companies globally, providing a faster, higher-quality, and more energy-efficient alternative to freeze-drying and air-drying. EnWave also operates NutraDried Food Company, which manufactures and sells all-natural cheese snacks under the Moon Cheese® brand.
